title: Simple Pocket Machines
body:
![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/simplemachines/banner.png)

![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/icons/png/fabric.png) ![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/icons/png/quilt.png) ![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/icons/png/neoforge.png) [![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/icons/png/dev_builds.png)](https://nightbloom.cc/project/pocketmachines)

***
![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/simplemachines/overview.png)

Simple Pocket Machines is a mod that allows you to create "portable" versions of some vanilla "machines". This allows you to use them on the go, while mining, building, surviving, etc.

Pocket machines are survival friendly, making it the perfect companion for your journey.

![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/simplemachines/features.png)

(Crafting recipes are Item Frame + Machine)

- Crafting Table
- Stonecutter
- Cartography Table
- Smithing Table
- Grindstone
- Loom
- Furnace
- Smoker
- Blast Furnace
- Anvil
- Enchanting Table
- Brewing Stand
- Chest (Same size as a double chest)
- Ender Chest

![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/simplemachines/help_support.png)

[![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/icons/png/discord.png)](https://discord.firstdark.dev) [![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/icons/png/github.png)](https://github.com/firstdarkdev/pocketmachines/issues) [![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/icons/png/ko-fi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/hypherionsa)

![](https://cdn.firstdark.dev/artpacks/simplemachines/permissions.png)

You are allowed to include this mod in your modpack, BUT, all downloads have to go through our offical Modrinth and CurseForge pages. You are not allowed to re-upload the mod to any other sites.

You are free to clone the code and distribute the mod as your own, but I ask that you please change the name, and you are not allowed to use any of our official docs/resources, as those are licensed under ARR.

**The artwork contained on this page is licensed under All Rights Reserved (by HypherionSA) and may not be re-used anywhere else, aside from our official Curse/Modrinth/Documentation pages. This license excludes the BisectHosting logo, which is licensed under their respective licenses**
